name: coTfsLssWaitForConfigureBitTimingRequest
title: coTfsLssWaitForConfigureBitTimingRequest
syntax: long coTfsLssWaitForConfigureBitTimingRequest( byte[] pTableSelector, byte[] pTableIndex );
description: This function waits for LSS Configure Bit-Timings Parameters request.

parameters.name: pTableSelector
parameters.description: Selects which bit timing parameter table shall be used.
